title: cyphomandra costaricensis
intro: Cyphomandra costaricensis, also known as the "Costa Rican tree tomato", is a type of plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, and is used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyphomandra costaricensis is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
